name: Bob's Bar-B-Que
tagline: Pearl City plate lunch institution — the kalbi and BBQ chicken are old-school Hawaii comfort food at its purest.
mustOrder: kalbi short ribs — smoky, sweet, tender
fried noodles — ask for extra crispy
talkStory: Open since the 1970s in a Pearl City strip mall, Bob's is one of the last old-guard plate lunch shops where recipes haven't changed in 40+ years. The kalbi short ribs are marinated overnight in a guarded family recipe, and the fried noodles are cooked in a wok so seasoned it's practically an heirloom. Regulars call ahead — the staff knows their order by voice. Cash only, no website, no social media — just honest plate lunch the way Hawaii used to do it.
